baseImage.prompt: Placeholder only for schema compatibility. This config generates a Seedance reference video.

storyboard.title: Switchlight Seedance AB Photoreal
storyboard.prompt:
Use the photoreal wardrobe-locked storyboard reference as the complete visual, staging, shot-order, choreography, and emotional-progression source for a 15-second LUMINA "Switchlight" comeback music video.

Follow all 12 storyboard beats sequentially from left to right, top to bottom. Do not skip, merge, reorder, or reinterpret the scenes. Preserve the storyboard's shot order, movement logic, framing variety, camera-angle variety, member placement logic, backstage-to-stage progression, and final pose.

Compress the full 12-beat sequence into 15 seconds. Each beat must appear clearly as a fast cinematic motion snapshot, not as a full-length action. Use urgent rhythm, quick cuts, match cuts, mirror cuts, hallway-to-stage whip transitions, and light-switch transitions. No long pauses until the final beat.

Keep the SAME five LUMINA member identities across the entire film: Rae, Jia, Sena, Nari, and Yumi. Preserve each member's face, hairstyle, body proportions, archetype, and wardrobe from the wardrobe-lock lineup reference. Do not duplicate members. Do not swap outfits. Do not change hair color, silhouettes, footwear, or styling between shots.

This is one continuous premium K-pop comeback MV, not separate fashion images. The world must feel like one coherent venue: backstage dressing room, chrome hallway, stage threshold, and full pearl/chrome performance stage are connected physical spaces. Maintain the same pearl/chrome/black visual language with baby-pink accents throughout.

Wardrobe continuity: Rae remains in the pearl satin structured mini-dress with slim chrome waist belt and black ankle boots. Jia remains in the cropped chrome-black moto jacket, black fitted performance shorts, and silver high boots. Sena remains in the soft pearl-pink draped mini-dress with chrome shoulder detail and delicate black heels. Nari remains in the black performance crop top with chrome harness lines, pearl-white pleated mini skirt, and black knee boots. Yumi remains in the pearl-pink cropped jacket over white performance top, pale pink wide-leg performance trousers, and white platform sneakers.

Panel 1: Mirror Before The Switch. Lyric: "Back door, heartbeat, mirror light". Wide backstage dressing-room mirror shot. Rae is the calm center at the mirror, the other four members appear in layered reflections behind her. Dim pearl bulbs, chrome garment rails, black marble counter. Slow push-in. Emotion: private nerves before the switch.

Panel 2: Chrome Sleeve / First Spark. Lyric: "Chrome on my sleeve like a satellite". Medium Jia wardrobe beat. Jia adjusts or snaps her chrome-black jacket with sharp girl-crush attitude. Rae remains visible in mirror depth, Nari warms up behind. Handheld drift. Chrome side light catches the jacket.

Panel 3: One Breath / Room Shines. Lyric: "One breath, then the whole room shines". All five members pause together in the dressing room. Pearl bulbs ignite in sequence. The group turns toward the glowing stage doorway. Camera widens slightly. Emotion: group ignition.

Panel 4: Stepping Through The Line. Lyric: "LUMINA stepping through the line". The group exits the dressing room into the chrome hallway. Rae leads the center line, Yumi glances back, Nari marks the first count. The light path pulls them forward. Smooth tracking movement.

Panel 5: Hallway Glow. Lyric: "I was quiet in the hallway glow". Yumi and Sena move through the deep chrome corridor with diagonal pearl lights. Yumi turns warmly toward camera, Sena holds a soft vocal focus. Camera tracks backward. Emotion: private vulnerability inside forward motion.

Panel 6: Speakers Blow / Color Rise. Lyric: "Counting every second till the speakers blow / Sena sings it soft". Sena close-up near a pearl-pink light bloom. Yumi crosses behind in soft motion blur. Hair and fabric move with stage airflow. Visible singing mouth, breath, and rising confidence. Shallow depth of field.

Panel 7: Vanity Future. Lyric: "See the future in the vanity mirror". Sena touches the mirror/reflection near the stage threshold. Rae appears centered behind her as future alignment. Mirror light travels toward the stage. Emotional self-recognition beat.

Panel 8: Switch The Light. Lyric: "Tell the whole room, switch the light". Nari cues the first count at the threshold. All five lock into lanes behind her. Pearl panels ignite downstage as the chrome hallway opens into the performance stage. This is the story pivot.

Panel 9: Hook Formation. Lyric: "Switchlight, switchlight / Turn me on". First full stage reveal. Full group diagonal hook formation: Rae center, Jia and Nari sharp side anchors, Sena and Yumi framing. Original light-switch hand gesture near shoulder height. Stabilized push or crane energy. Pearl panels brighten behind them.

Panel 10: Step, Pose, Shine. Lyric: "Step, pose, shine, don't blink". Low-angle performance hit. The five members take one forward step and land in a clean synchronized original pose. Five pearl light columns map to the five members. Reflective black-chrome floor shows full-body reflections.

Panel 11: Camera Catch / Rap Charge. Lyric: "Click, click, camera, catch my angle / Nari on the count, Jia on the flame". Kinetic Jia/Nari rap beat. Jia cuts toward lens with sharp attitude, Nari crosses behind with a count gesture. Chrome rim light, fast orbit or whip-pan energy, polished but aggressive.

Panel 12: Where The Lights Go Bright. Lyric: "Meet us where the lights go bright". Final full-group hero shot under the chrome arch. Stage fully switched on. Rae calm center, all members locked into final stage identities. Hard spotlight plus pearl field. Hold this final beat for the last 1 second.

Timing: Total duration is 15 seconds. Panels 1-11 should move quickly, roughly 1.1 to 1.25 seconds each, with match cuts and whip transitions. Panel 12 holds for the final 1 second. No pause before the final pose.

Motion rules: Premium MV camera movement only. Use stable handheld drift, smooth tracking, mirror push-ins, hallway tracking, low-angle stage hits, clean orbit motion, and fast light-switch match cuts. Avoid random AI drifting, excessive jitter, melted motion, unnatural body warping, or floating feet.

Performance rules: Continuous live singing and performance energy throughout. Show visible breath, mouth movement, facial intensity, body strain, fabric motion, hair motion, floor contact, and emotional escalation from private nerves to confident stage command.

Lighting rules: Preserve pearl/chrome/black lighting continuity. Dressing room starts dim and intimate, hallway becomes brighter and more directional, stage fully activates by the hook. Reflections on chrome walls, mirrors, floor, and wardrobe must react naturally to the changing light sources.

Facial performance: Use expressive K-pop MV performance faces with emotional escalation: AU1+AU4 tension during backstage nerves. AU5 intensity during hallway and threshold beats. AU25 singing mouth during vocal moments. AU26 open release during hook and final payoff. AU43 softened release only near the final beat.

Negative rules: No Lumora. No product props. No beauty/skincare claims. No readable logos. No captions. No text. No annotations. No timestamps. No watermark. No real idol likenesses. No copied choreography. No extra members. No duplicated members. No outfit swaps. No hairstyle changes. No face changes. No body proportion inconsistencies. No anime, illustration, sketch, or plastic CGI look. No generic chrome stage without the specific dressing-room-to-hallway-to-stage progression.
